jobs.title: 2D Artist - Monopoly GO!
jobs.content: <p><strong>Scopely</strong> is the <strong>mobile-games publishing platform</strong> behind Monopoly GO!, Star Trek Fleet Command, MARVEL Strike Force, and (via the Niantic acquisition) Pokémon GO and Pikmin Bloom.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The 2D Artist on Monopoly GO! crafts the visual language of the live-operations calendar across the Fortune 500 cohort.</p>

jobs.title: Accounting Specialist
jobs.content: <p>Scopely is the modern mobile-games publishing platform powering live-operations across global IP-portfolio brands.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Accounting Specialist partners with Finance Operations and IP-licensing partners to scale month-end close cycles.</p>
